name: 24-invalid-evidence-id-duplicate
description: Two entries in aibom.evidence[] share the same id. Harness rejects at semantic-validation.
notes: Evidence ids are the primary key of the evidence ledger; capability.evidence[] and policyVerdict.evidence[] reference ledger entries by id. Duplicate ids break referential integrity. JSON Schema cannot enforce uniqueness on a sub-field across array items in Draft 2020-12 without bespoke extensions, so this is a harness check.
